_export.subject: Able.cz s.r.o.
_export.note: Public-source review. Derived losslessly from the dossier data; nothing added.

resolvedQuestions.question: Filed financial statements (revenue, result, assets) — 'available at justice.cz Sbírka listin, not retrieved in this pass.'
resolvedQuestions.resolution: Retrieved, preserved and parsed the same day the question was written (SL68 + Blackfish SL21/SL23); the gap text nevertheless stayed in the dossier until 2026-07-18 — a stale-gap defect. Figures live in financials.verified with exact row citations; headcount is genuinely absent from the filings and remains open above.

resolvedQuestions.question: The exact stake split and jednatel dates for one label s.r.o.'s three co-owners (CON-02).
resolvedQuestions.resolution: Resolved from the preserved primary ARES VR record for IČO 02474727: J. Kaman 36 % (since 2014), O. Kaman 34 %, R. Juhaňák 30 % (both since 23 Feb 2022). See CON-02 (RESOLVED) and CLM-19.

resolvedQuestions.question: Whether the marketing roles CTO (Grolig) and CSO (Juhaňák) correspond to any current statutory function.
resolvedQuestions.resolution: Resolved from the complete preserved VR history: neither appears in Able.cz's statutory body at any point 2012–2026. Juhaňák is a 2.30 % shareholder (primary-verified); Grolig holds no registered role or stake at all (CLM-37/38).

resolvedQuestions.question: 'All facts sourced to SRC-10/SRC-11 cannot reach VERIFIED_PRIMARY because the or.justice.cz search UI is JS-rendered.'
resolvedQuestions.resolution: The premise is obsolete: the official ARES VR REST endpoint serves the full register record (officers, shareholders, histories) as structured JSON. All 19 in-scope entities were fetched, preserved and hashed; the affected facts were re-derived from primary artifacts and upgraded or corrected accordingly.
